item.title: Newts...

item.title: Turned 38 and my parents ask why I have no kids yet. I tell them that between work and home life, just do not have the time.
item.description: What I actually do with my time at home with my 2 cats. Also that kids are expensive and no desire to have any in the foreseeable future.
item.dc:creator: lsybarra

item.title: "Don't forget who's the boss!" the gorilla probably!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: You had me in the first half... (plus moment of zen tax)
item.description:
I read this and immediately when into curious anger mode...
... But I was pleasantly bamboozled! And I thought you weirdos might get a giggle, too!
Land seal tax (Elli Bay!)
And please enjoy what I saw today on my walk with the dogs... A pod of dolphins (including a BABY!) fucking with the pelicans. (audio removed cuz it was heckin' wimdy) Apologies for the less than stellar stability, I was trying to keep my dog from running away AND not drop my phone into the intracoastal.
item.dc:creator: MadamPuddifoot

item.title: Images of Note: Everyone important died
item.description:
Turn on God mode and just start shooting up the place
Dog woman has an office job.
Mood.
brb going into THE T U N N E L S
They just vibin.
D:List
Don't separate your warriors and your poets, lest you have your thinking done by cowards and your fighting done by fools.
it's true y'know.
This is how I feel in officewear.
Big Bertha.
Finally I can murder Elliot.
When you put it like this, MAGA is fucking silly.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Egg
Spin
Mlem
For a group of people accusing LGBT people of being pedophiles, they sure the hell love pedophillia.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also I'm streaming M/W/F: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I wish he’d take me next
item.description: Edit: Imgur automatically added an “eagle” tag, but this is actually an Andean condor carrying a chamois. I can’t remove the tag unfortunately. Edit2: the tag is fixed now!
